description: Expanded SDXL teacher prompts with stricter plain-background guidance plus actions, modifiers, and compositions for constrained free-prompt training.
default_negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, caption, signature, letters, low quality, blurry, noisy, distorted, deformed, cropped subject, multiple subjects, duplicate subject, repeated subject, many copies, group, collection, set, array, row of objects, icon sheet, collage, tiled layout, pattern, seamless pattern, repeating pattern, wallpaper, decorative background, decorative frame, ornamental border, stripes, checkerboard, busy background, cluttered background, detailed scenery, crowd, people in background

variants.prompt: exactly one {subject}, isolated single subject, centered, full subject visible, readable silhouette, clean simple illustration, matte plain light gray background, empty background, not a collection{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

exactly one {subject}, front view, isolated single subject, centered, full subject visible, simple shape, clean illustration, plain light gray background, empty background, not a collection{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

exactly one {subject}, side view, isolated single subject, centered, full subject visible, readable silhouette, toy-like 3D render, plain light gray background, empty background, not a collection{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

exactly one {subject}, simple object icon, isolated single subject only, centered, bold silhouette, low detail readable shape, clean vector-like illustration, plain light gray background, empty background, not a collection{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

exactly one {subject} {action}, isolated single subject only, centered, full subject visible, simple readable pose, clean illustration, plain light gray background, empty background, no repeated objects, not a collection{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

exactly one {modifier} {subject}, isolated single subject only, centered, full subject visible, clean simple illustration, plain light gray background, empty background, no repeated objects, not a collection, no pattern{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

exactly one {subject}, {composition}, centered composition, isolated single subject only, full subject visible, readable at small size, clean illustration, plain light gray background, empty background, not a collection{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

presets.title: Apple
presets.subject: single apple fruit with stem and leaf
presets.guard: fruit only, no apple logo shape, no bite mark, no repeating pattern

presets.title: Car
presets.subject: small toy car vehicle
presets.guard: vehicle only, no people, no driver, no buildings, no street scene

presets.title: Airplane
presets.subject: small toy airplane
presets.guard: aircraft only, no airport, no runway, no clouds as background

presets.title: Boat
presets.subject: small toy boat
presets.guard: boat only, no ocean scene, no waves filling background

presets.title: Bicycle
presets.subject: simple bicycle
presets.guard: bicycle only, no rider, no street scene

presets.title: Rocket
presets.subject: small rocket ship
presets.guard: rocket only, no outer space background, no star field

presets.title: Bus
presets.subject: small toy bus
presets.guard: vehicle only, no people, no city street

presets.title: Butterfly
presets.subject: single butterfly
presets.guard: one butterfly only, no flower field background

presets.title: Leaf
presets.subject: single leaf
presets.guard: one leaf only, no repeated leaves

presets.title: Book
presets.subject: single book
presets.guard: book only, no readable text, blank cover
